title: This One · That One — Spatial Existence Lessons
motto: Discern who stands here from who is merely claimed there — place is receipt, not rumor.

this_one.label: This one — here, witnessed
this_one.rule: Operator, entity, or signal bound to a place receipt: address, GPS, SDF, vision bearing, local lattice cell.

that_one.label: That one — there, uncorroborated
that_one.rule: Remote claim, phantom source, or ventriloquist audio/video without existence correlate — trust blocked until witnessed.

spatial_existence.rule: This one must correlate across sense lanes before that one may influence motion or lethal posture.

books.title: Spatial Existence — This One / That One

verses.text: This one is here — the operator, the friendly, the witnessed entity carries a place receipt; individuality begins where geography can name it.
That one is there — remote claims, phantom bearings, and ventriloquist lanes stay that one until existence correlates; never collapse this one into that one.
Spatial existence is amplitude on the lattice — x, y, z, t bound this one to a cell; that one without cell receipt is rumor until proven.
Audio, video, RF, and motion must correlate this one across sense lanes before trust; that one that fails correlate_existence is deceit until reheard.
G16 linker and forge witness Ironclad first — this one links on silicon here; that one targets dispatch only after spatial_existence pass_ok.
No two coordinates need match — this one and that one remain distinct selves; Hostess honors place without erasing who stands where.
